evals.prompt: Design the UX for a user onboarding flow. New users sign up, pick a plan, set up their profile, then land on their empty dashboard.
evals.expected_output: Agent produces a Mermaid journey diagram scoring each step. Identifies pain points (plan selection is typically low-score). Provides layout descriptor for each screen. Lists required Shadcn/ui components (Stepper, Card, Select). Accessibility notes for the form steps.

evals.prompt: My mobile users are having trouble tapping buttons. Can you review the UI for accessibility issues?
evals.expected_output: Agent runs the WCAG accessibility checklist. Flags: touch targets under 44x44px, missing aria-labels on icon buttons. Provides fix: min-h-[44px] min-w-[44px] on button elements. Suggests Radix UI for custom interactive elements.

evals.prompt: Define the design token system for our app. Primary brand color is a deep blue. We need dark mode support.
evals.expected_output: Agent produces the globals.css :root and .dark blocks with HSL CSS variable tokens. Provides tailwind.config.ts extend block. Shows example usage: bg-primary text-primary-foreground. Contrast ratio notes included.
